description: Autonomis hooks: session start (load state), pre-compact (persist state), pre-commit (review gate), plan-review-owasp (suggest OWASP skills).

sessionStart.description: Load state from .autonomis/ so orchestrator can resume; see session-start.md

preCompact.description: Persist state to .autonomis/runs/<runId>/ before compaction; see pre-compact.md (FLAW-001 mitigation)

preCommit.description: Optional: ensure only reviewed work is committed; install to .git/hooks/pre-commit

planReviewOwasp.description: After Plan phase: suggest domain OWASP skills from plan keywords; see plan-review-owasp.md
